name: Element Magician
name_jp: エレメント・マジシャン
desc: This monster gets the following effect(s) while there is a monster(s) with the following Attribute(s) on the field: ● WATER: Control of this card cannot switch. ● WIND: If this card destroyed your opponent's monster by battle, it can attack once again in a row.
mnst_eff: This monster gets the following effect(s) while there is a monster(s) with the following Attribute(s) on the field: ● WATER: Control of this card cannot switch. ● WIND: If this card destroyed your opponent's monster by battle, it can attack once again in a row.
eff: This monster gets the following effect(s) while there is a monster(s) with the following Attribute(s) on the field: ● WATER: Control of this card cannot switch. ● WIND: If this card destroyed your opponent's monster by battle, it can attack once again in a row.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
